mapper.sql: tjai.id, tjai.group_id, tjai.operation_code, tjai.error_msg, tjai.data_status, tjai.employee_id, tjai.process, tjai.job, tjai.authentication_level, tjai.level, tjai.surety, tjai.first_general_grade, tjai.second_general_grade, tjai.three_general_grade, tjai.first_theory_grade, tjai.second_theory_grade, tjai.three_theory_grade, tjai.first_operation_grade, tjai.second_operation_grade, tjai.three_operation_grade, tjai.credential_grant_date, tjai.enabled_time, tjai.dept_name, tjai.department, tjai.team, tjai.work_card, tjai.name, tjai.create_time, tjai.create_by, tjai.update_time, tjai.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.process as ${tAlias}_process, ${tAlias}.job as ${tAlias}_job, ${tAlias}.authentication_level as ${tAlias}_authentication_level, ${tAlias}.level as ${tAlias}_level, ${tAlias}.surety as ${tAlias}_surety, ${tAlias}.first_general_grade as ${tAlias}_first_general_grade, ${tAlias}.second_general_grade as ${tAlias}_second_general_grade, ${tAlias}.three_general_grade as ${tAlias}_three_general_grade, ${tAlias}.first_theory_grade as ${tAlias}_first_theory_grade, ${tAlias}.second_theory_grade as ${tAlias}_second_theory_grade, ${tAlias}.three_theory_grade as ${tAlias}_three_theory_grade, ${tAlias}.first_operation_grade as ${tAlias}_first_operation_grade, ${tAlias}.second_operation_grade as ${tAlias}_second_operation_grade, ${tAlias}.three_operation_grade as ${tAlias}_three_operation_grade, ${tAlias}.credential_grant_date as ${tAlias}_credential_grant_date, ${tAlias}.enabled_time as ${tAlias}_enabled_time, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into td_job_authentication_interface (group_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, employee_id, process, job, authentication_level, level, surety, first_general_grade, second_general_grade, three_general_grade, first_theory_grade, second_theory_grade, three_theory_grade, first_operation_grade, second_operation_grade, three_operation_grade, credential_grant_date, enabled_time, dept_name, department, team, work_card, name, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{process,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authenticationLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{surety,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{secondGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{firstTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{secondTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{firstOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{secondOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{credentialGrantDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{enabledTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_job_authentication_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, process = #{process,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job = #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, authentication_level = #{authenticationLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, surety = #{surety,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, first_general_grade = #{firstGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, second_general_grade = #{secondGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, three_general_grade = #{threeGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, first_theory_grade = #{firstTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, second_theory_grade = #{secondTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, three_theory_grade = #{threeTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, first_operation_grade = #{firstOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, second_operation_grade = #{secondOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, three_operation_grade = #{threeOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, credential_grant_date = #{credentialGrantDate,jdbcType=DATE}, enabled_time = #{enabledTime,jdbcType=DATE}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into td_job_authentication_interface (group_id, employee_id,work_card, name, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, process, dept_name, department, team, job, authentication_level, level, surety, first_general_grade, second_general_grade, three_general_grade, first_theory_grade, second_theory_grade, three_theory_grade, first_operation_grade, second_operation_grade, three_operation_grade, credential_grant_date, enabled_time, create_time,create_by, update_time, update_by) select #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1),
right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6), #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, 'U', case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1) = -1 then '当前上岗认证数据中不存在该员工' else '' end, case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1) = -1 then 'F' else 'T' end, #{process,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authenticationLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{surety,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{secondGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{firstTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{secondTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{firstOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{secondOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{credentialGrantDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{enabledTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}
